calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-14-2018 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-16-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF LAURENCE VINOCUR'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Laurenc Vinocur's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendant Airgas, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements.

Order and Judgment signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
